title: "Much Madness Is Divinest Sense"
content:
Much madness is divinest sense
    To a discerning eye;
    Much sense the starkest madness.
    'T is the majority
    In this, as all, prevails.
    Assent, and you are sane;
    Demur, -- you're straightway dangerous,
    And handled with a chain.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in ""Much Madness Is Divinest Sense""...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
